PREMIUM CHARACTER SETUP:
1. Add a realistic rigged male model in GLB format (Mixamo-compatible recommended).
2. Name it "character.glb".
3. Place it in this folder: "public/models/character.glb".
4. The app auto-detects this file and uses it as the main player character.

If "character.glb" is missing, the app safely falls back to a built-in model.

Recommended profile for this project:
- Age: 22-28
- Role: AI Systems Architect / Tech Founder
- Professional fade haircut
- Light trimmed beard
- Slim-fit black blazer, charcoal trousers, black formal shoes

Face quality target (for best results in this app):
- Male Indian face (22-26), North-Indian features, balanced proportions
- Medium wheatish / warm brown albedo map
- Dark brown iris map with realistic sclera roughness variation
- Subtle beard/stubble mask (trimmed, professional)
- Skin normal + roughness maps with micro-pores (non-plastic finish)
- Neutral expression blendshapes (smile/brow/eyelid) for calm confident look

Current renderer expectations for premium office realism:
- Age profile target: 23 years
- Calm neutral expression with subtle micro-smile
- Soft studio key + subtle rim light
- Avoid over-smoothed skin and plastic highlights
